_extract_section definition:
def _extract_section(text, name):
    m = re.search(rf'^#{1,3}\s+{re.escape(name)}\s*$', text, re.I | re.M)
    if not m: return ""
    start = m.end()
    nxt = re.search(r'^#{1,3}\s+', text[start:], re.M)
    end = start + nxt.start() if nxt else len(text)
    return text[start:end].strip()
